name: All Vehicles
descr: Applies to all vehicle types — no class distinction

name: Light Vehicle
descr: Passenger cars and light commercials (GVM ≤ 4.5 t) — HVNL does not apply

name: Heavy Vehicle
descr: Any vehicle with GVM > 4.5 t — subject to HVNL 2013

name: B-Double
descr: Two semi-trailers coupled in combination; max 26 m / 62.5 t GCM (NHVR HVNL §154–157)

name: Road Train
descr: A-train, B-train or C-train combinations > 26 m — approved route permit required (HVNL Part 4)

name: PBS Level 1
descr: Performance Based Standards Level 1 — short road trains up to 19 m (NHVR)

name: PBS Level 2
descr: Performance Based Standards Level 2 — B-doubles and medium road trains up to 26 m (NHVR)

name: PBS Level 3
descr: Performance Based Standards Level 3 — large road trains up to 36.5 m (NHVR)

name: PBS Level 4
descr: Performance Based Standards Level 4 — extra-long combinations up to 53.5 m (NHVR)

name: HML (High Mass Limit)
descr: Higher Mass Limit vehicles — approved axle-mass concession above General Mass Limits (HVNL §§96–99)

name: CML (Concessional Mass Limit)
descr: Concessional Mass Limit vehicles — special permit for oversize/overmass (HVNL Part 4.7)

name: Oversize / Overmass
descr: Vehicles exceeding standard dimension or mass limits — OSOM permit required (HVNL Part 4.7)

name: Pedestrian / Cyclist
descr: Non-motorised — foot traffic and bicycles; relevant for pedestrian/shared path bridges
